purpose: Define source-safe preview validation for shopper communication history across in-app, WhatsApp fallback, email draft/manual log, support notes and CRM refs without sending, reading or importing real communications.
historyRules: Communication history stores safe events, summaries and refs, not raw conversations.
Every communication must be linked to participantRef and role, not raw phone or raw email.
Shopper-related history should link to shopperId and, when applicable, visitId/hrRowId/sourceVisitRef, postulationId or assignmentId.
WhatsApp Web fallback is manual and must require manual confirmation before any externally-sent label.
Email draft preview and email manual log are not provider proof.
Provider message IDs may only be stored as opaque refs once future gates permit it.
Legacy communications are allowed only as sanitized preview summaries and must not include raw bodies, attachments or contact data.
Financial/payment communications must not include bank details or account numbers.
claudePrototypeImpact: Shopper history UI must not display raw WhatsApp/email bodies, phones, emails or attachments.
Show communication states: preview, draft, manual log, pending backend, manual confirmation, provider pending and blocked sensitive payload.
Separate in-app notifications from external communication logs.
Link history to stable entities such as shopperId, visitId, postulationId, assignmentId, notificationId, mailActionId and crmEntityId.
Do not say message sent, synced or delivered unless explicit manual confirmation exists or future provider gates are active.

newLessons: How communications link to visits and postulaciones
How to separate notification, draft, manual log and provider pending
interactiveChecklists: Before linking a communication to a visit
Before including payment information in a message

hardStops: Do not read real email or WhatsApp from this preview.
Do not send email or WhatsApp from this preview.
Do not call Make from this preview.
Do not write Firestore or Storage from this preview.
Do not store raw message bodies, phone numbers, email addresses or attachments.
Do not mark sent/synced/delivered without explicit manual confirmation or future provider gate.
Do not import legacy communications unless sanitized and source-safe.
